prompt: Lines Perpendicular Weave. Black background. Four horizontal lines (each 400px, 3px, white) and four vertical lines (each 400px, 3px, white), forming woven pattern with over/under crossings. Animation (10s): 0-5s: Horizontal lines draw left to right sequentially (1.25s each). 5-10s: Vertical lines draw top to bottom sequentially (1.25s each), appearing to weave over/under horizontal lines (achieved through z-index layering or draw order). [cite_start]Total duration: 10s. [cite: 592, 593, 594, 595, 596]

Shapes Color Sync. Light grey background. Three shapes: circle (140px), square (140px), triangle (140px base), arranged horizontally (180px spacing). All start white. Animation (9s): All shapes cycle through same color sequence simultaneously in perfect sync: 0-1.5s: All morph to red. 1.5-3s: All morph to orange. 3-4.5s: All morph to yellow. 4.5-6s: All morph to green. 6-7.5s: All morph to blue. 7.5-9s: All morph to purple. [cite_start]Total duration: 9s. [cite: 597, 598, 599, 600, 601]

Rectangles Interlock. White background. Two rectangles: horizontal (300px x 80px, blue #1976D2) and vertical (80px x 300px, red #E53935). Animation (7s): 0-2s: Horizontal rectangle slides in from left to center. 2-4s: Vertical rectangle slides down from top, interlocks with horizontal (crosses through center, forming plus/cross shape). 4-5.5s: Both rotate 45° together around intersection point. 5.5-7s: Both scale together 100% -> 120% -> 100%. [cite_start]Total duration: 7s. [cite: 602, 603, 604, 605, 606, 607]

Opacity Gradient Cascade. Gradient background. Ten circles (each 80px, all cyan #00BCD4), vertical column (90px spacing). Animation (8s): 0-1s: All appear simultaneously at different opacities forming gradient: top circle 100%, second 90%, third 80%... bottom 10%. 1-7s: Opacity values shift downward in cascade: top becomes 90%, second becomes 100%, third becomes 90%, etc. Creates flowing opacity wave moving down column. Completes 3 cascade cycles. 7-8s: All settle at 100%. [cite_start]Total duration: 8s. [cite: 608, 609, 610, 611, 612]

Complex Coordinated Finale. Black background. Center: Large circle (200px, gold #FFD700 outline 4px, no fill). Around it: 8 triangles (each 100px, different rainbow colors) pointing toward center, positioned radially (240px from center, 45° apart). Animation (12s): 0-2s: Center circle appears and pulses (scale 100% -> 110% -> 100%). 2-6s: Triangles appear sequentially clockwise (0.5s each). 6-8s: All triangles rotate 180° simultaneously (now pointing away from center). 8-10s: Triangles orbit clockwise around circle, maintaining formation, 90° orbit. 10-12s: All triangles move toward center, all shapes fade out together. Total duration: 12s. [cite_start]Grand finale testing all coordination techniques. [cite: 613, 614, 615, 616, 617, 618, 619]

Squares Connected Rotation. White background. A thin horizontal line (400px length, 10px thickness, gray #616161) placed at center. Two squares attached at both ends of the line: red (#E53935, 90px) on left end and blue (#1E88E5, 90px) on right end. Animation (8s): 0-1.5s: Line and squares fade in together. 1.5-5s: Entire system rotates 360° around the midpoint of the line. 5-6.5s: Rotation reverses slightly (360° -> 300°). 6.5-8s: System stabilizes at horizontal position. Total duration: 8s. [cite: 610, 611, 612, 613]

Triangle Orbit System. Light background. One large circle (yellow #FDD835, 150px) placed at center. Three small triangles (red #E53935, blue #1E88E5, green #43A047, each 70px) placed around the circle forming an equilateral triangle arrangement about 200px away. Animation (9s): 0-1.5s: Center circle and triangles fade in. 1.5-6s: All triangles orbit around the central circle clockwise completing one full rotation. 6-7.5s: Triangles rotate individually 180° while continuing orbit. 7.5-9s: Orbit slows and triangles return to original triangle formation. Total duration: 9s. [cite: 615, 616, 617, 618]

Square Ring Formation. White background. Four squares: red (#E53935), blue (#1E88E5), green (#43A047), yellow (#FDD835), each 90px. Start stacked at center overlapping each other. Animation (8s): 0-1.5s: All squares fade in at center. 1.5-3s: Squares move outward in four directions forming a ring (top, bottom, left, right positions). 3-6s: All squares rotate together around the center forming a circular orbit pattern. 6-7s: Squares rotate individually 180°. 7-8s: Squares move back to center and stack again. Total duration: 8s. [cite: 630, 631, 632, 633]

Satellite With Solar Panels. Dark background. One circle (orange #FB8C00, 140px) placed at the center as a planet. A small rectangle (120px x 60px, gray #90A4AE) attached to the right side of the planet acts as a satellite body. Two thin rectangles (80px x 20px, blue #1E88E5) are attached to the top and bottom of the satellite body as solar panels. Animation (9s): 0-1.5s: All elements fade in. 1.5-6s: The satellite body orbits around the planet while the two solar panels remain attached to the satellite body. 6-7.5s: The solar panels pivot outward slightly (0° -> 40°) while orbit continues. 7.5-9s: Orbit slows and panels return to original position. Total duration: 9s.

Windmill System. Light background. A vertical rectangle (80px x 300px, gray #757575) stands at center as a tower. At the top of the tower a small circle (40px, black #212121) acts as a hub. Four thin rectangles (220px x 30px, red #E53935) are attached around the hub as blades. Animation (8s): 0-1.5s: Tower, hub and blades fade in. 1.5-6s: The blades rotate continuously around the hub completing two full rotations. 6-8s: Rotation gradually slows until the blades stop. Total duration: 8s.

Robot Arm Mechanism. White background. A large rectangle (200px x 120px, blue #1E88E5) acts as a robot base at the bottom center. A long thin rectangle (300px x 40px, gray #9E9E9E) is attached to the top of the base as an arm. At the end of the arm a small circle (60px, red #E53935) acts as a gripper. Animation (8s): 0-1.5s: Base, arm and gripper fade in. 1.5-4s: The arm pivots upward around the top of the base (0° -> 60°). 4-6s: The gripper rotates independently (0° -> 180°). 6-8s: The arm lowers back to original position. Total duration: 8s.

Train With Wheels. Light background. A long rectangle (500px x 120px, red #E53935) acts as a train body at center. Two circles (90px, black #212121) are attached under the left and right sides of the rectangle as wheels. Animation (8s): 0-1.5s: Train body and wheels fade in. 1.5-6s: The train body moves from left to right across the screen while both wheels rotate continuously as if rolling. 6-8s: The train slows down and stops at the right side. Total duration: 8s.

Orbiting Moon System. Dark background. A large circle (yellow #FDD835, 160px) at the center acts as a sun. A medium circle (blue #1E88E5, 100px) is placed 250px away and acts as a planet. A small circle (gray #BDBDBD, 50px) is attached near the planet as a moon. Animation (10s): 0-2s: Sun, planet and moon fade in. 2-8s: The planet orbits around the sun while the moon simultaneously orbits around the planet. 8-10s: Motion slows but maintains the orbital structure. Total duration: 10s.

Swinging Sign Board. Light background. A thin horizontal line (400px, black #212121) is attached at the top center acting as a support bar. Two thin vertical lines (120px, gray #616161) hang from the support bar. At the bottom of these lines a rectangle (260px x 120px, blue #1E88E5) acts as a sign board. Animation (8s): 0-1.5s: The support bar, chains and sign board fade in. 1.5-5s: The sign board swings left and right like a hanging sign (±30° rotation) around the top connection points. 5-7s: Swing amplitude reduces gradually. 7-8s: Sign stabilizes at center. Total duration: 8s.

Orbiting Pendulum System. Dark background. One large circle (yellow #FDD835, 140px) at the center acts as a core. A thin line (300px length, 8px thickness, white #FFFFFF) is attached to the right side of the core circle. At the end of the line a small blue circle (#1E88E5, 70px) acts as a pendulum weight. Animation (10s): 0-1.5s: Core circle, line, and small circle fade in together. 1.5-6s: The entire line and small circle rotate around the core circle completing one full orbit. 3-7s: While orbiting, the small circle swings slightly like a pendulum relative to the line (±25° pivot). 6-8s: Orbit slows but the pendulum swing continues with smaller amplitude. 8-10s: All motion gradually stabilizes and objects hold final position. Total duration: 10s.

Animated Square Effects. Dark background. One square (blue #1E88E5, 120px) placed at the center of the screen. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Square fades in from opacity 0 to full visibility. 1-3s: Square rotates slowly 0° -> 180°. 3-4.5s: Square expands in size from 120px to 180px. 4.5-6s: Square shrinks back to original size (180px -> 120px). 6-7s: Square emits a soft glow effect around its edges (blue glow intensity increases). 7-8s: Glow fades and square returns to normal state. Total duration: 8s.

Text Badge Animation. Light background. A rounded rectangle badge (300px x 120px, blue #1E88E5, corner radius 24px) placed at the center. Inside the badge a white text label 'HELLO' (bold sans-serif, 60px) is centered horizontally and vertically. Animation (8s): 0-1s: The rounded rectangle fades in at center. 1-2s: The text fades in slightly after the rectangle. 2-4s: The entire badge (rectangle and text together) scales up from 100% -> 115%. 4-5.5s: The badge rotates slightly (-8° -> 8°) like a gentle wobble while the text remains centered inside the box. 5.5-7s: The badge returns to normal rotation and scales back to original size. 7-8s: Both text and rectangle fade out together. Total duration: 8s.

Sliding Label Tag. Light background. A rounded rectangle (340px x 120px, purple #8E24AA, corner radius 30px) placed at the center. Inside the rectangle a white text label 'SALE' (bold sans-serif, 64px) is centered. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Rectangle slides in from the left side while the text appears with a slight delay. 1-3s: The text scales up slightly (100% -> 120%) and settles back. 3-5s: The rectangle rotates slightly (0° -> 10° -> -10° -> 0°) while the text remains aligned in the center. 5-7s: Both rectangle and text move upward together by 150px. 7-8s: The entire label fades out. Total duration: 8s.

Rotating Wheel Spokes. Light background. One circle (black #212121, 160px diameter) placed at the center acts as a wheel rim. Inside the circle four thin lines (160px length, 6px thickness, gray #616161) pass through the center forming cross spokes: one horizontal, one vertical, and two diagonal lines at 45°. All lines are fixed to the center of the circle like wheel spokes. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Circle and all four lines fade in together at center. 1-6s: The entire wheel system (circle and all attached lines) rotates continuously around its center completing two full rotations (0° -> 720°). The spokes remain fixed relative to the circle and rotate together with it. 6-8s: Rotation gradually slows until the wheel stops at its original orientation. Total duration: 8s.
